tutorial_steps.prompt_text: Welcome to Cormorant Ridge Mall. You have a store to run. Start walking.
tutorial_steps.action: Click a store card to open it

tutorial_steps.prompt_text: Head to your store in the mall. Look for the storefront with your sign.
tutorial_steps.action: Click the store card to enter

tutorial_steps.prompt_text: Step inside your store. Press the interact key when facing the entrance.
tutorial_steps.action: Click the entrance or press interact

tutorial_steps.prompt_text: Open your inventory panel to see what stock you have available to sell.
Stock a shelf — drag an item from inventory onto an empty shelf slot.
Open the pricing panel. Every item needs a price before customers will buy it.
Set a price for your stocked item. Price too high and customers walk. Too low and you lose.
Customers will arrive on their own. Stay in the store and let them browse.
tutorial_steps.action: Wait for a customer to browse

tutorial_steps.prompt_text: A customer is ready to buy. Watch the sale complete — that sound is money.
End the day when you're ready. Open the day panel and confirm to close up shop.
tutorial_steps.action: Open day panel and close up shop
